title: OPERATION SAUCER #1 [Operação Prato]  reports n.001 to n.010 [1977]
excerpt: 01- REG n. 001 02- PLACE: Highway PA-17-KM19 –  SANTO ANTONIO DO TAUÁ-PA 03- DATE / TIME: 02 Sep 77 at 22: 00h 04- DESCRIPTION: Luminous body 05- COLOR: Yellow, changing to red 06- SHAPE: Inverted plate, with a sharp apex forming an almost triangular figure. 07-APPARENT SIZE: 1.30 to 1.40m 08-MOVEMENT: In zig-zag, in […]
text_preview:
- 01- REG n. 001

- 02- PLACE: Highway PA-17-KM19 –  SANTO ANTONIO DO TAUÁ-PA

- 03- DATE / TIME: 02 Sep 77 at 22: 00h

- 04- DESCRIPTION: Luminous body

- 05- COLOR: Yellow, changing to red

- 06- SHAPE: Inverted plate, with a sharp apex forming an almost triangular figure.

- 07-APPARENT SIZE: 1.30 to 1.40m

- 08-MOVEMENT: In zig-zag, in the East / West direction

- 09-SPEED: Low, at the beginning of the travel, gradual increase until reaching great speed

- 10-ALTITUDE: 30m (estimated)

- 11-DISTANCE: 50m (estimated)

- 12-OBSERVER (S): Mrs. AMÉLIA MARTINS DA SILVA

- 13-NOTE: The bottom (b
summary: Operation Saucer (Operação Prato) reports 001–010 document ten civilian UFO encounters in Para state in Sep–Oct 1977, including paralysis from a light beam and directed blue-light emissions.
